summary:
Morphine use in pediatric patients may lead to increased agitation or even seizures due to its ability to paradoxically enhance neural activity despite intended sedative effects; no alternative options consistently show such an adverse reaction pattern as clearly documented for opioid administration generally and morphine specifically among those evaluated here. \boxed{A}
